response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies react to peanuts and not water  
allergies trigger immune response in the body when exposed to peanuts  
immune system releases chemicals that cause symptoms in allergic individuals  
symptoms include rash and difficulty breathing  
allergies are triggered by peanuts and not water  
water does not contain peanuts and does not trigger allergic reactions  
allergic individuals cannot survive in water due to their immune system reaction  
their bodies are not adapted to the environment of water  
water is not a source of peanuts and does not cause allergic reactions  
allergic people cannot live underwater due to their immune system response to peanuts
